title: AssetBackedEnum
description: Specifies the underlying asset or asset pool securing an Asset Backed debt instrument.

oneOf.title: AutoLoan
oneOf.description: When the asset(s) backing the debt are auto loans.

oneOf.title: CreditCard
oneOf.description: When the asset(s) backing the debt are credit card loans.

oneOf.title: HomeEquity
oneOf.description: When the asset(s) backing the debt are home equity loans, in which the borrower uses the equity of their home as collateral.

oneOf.title: Mortgage
oneOf.description: When the asset(s) backing the debt instrument is a pool of mortgage loans, e.g. for a mortgage backed security.

oneOf.title: Other
oneOf.description: Any other asset which generates receivables for an Asset Backed Security.

oneOf.title: Property
oneOf.description: When the asset(s) backing the debt are property, typically when the debt is a mortgage loan.

oneOf.title: StudentLoan
oneOf.description: When the asset(s) backing the debt are student loans.
